prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 49.3 kg; Height 152.1 cm; BMI 21.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.2%; 6 months ago 6.1%; 3 months ago 6.0%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 118mg/dL; 6 months ago 116mg/dL; 3 months ago 113mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 49.9kg; 9 months ago 50.8kg; 6 months ago 45.9kg; 3 months ago 47.2kg; current 49.3kg), Height (12 months ago 152.1cm; 9 months ago 152.1cm; 6 months ago 152.1cm; 3 months ago 152.1cm; current 152.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 23U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; current 99mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 25mg/g; 9 months ago 20mg/g; 6 months ago 18mg/g; 3 months ago 19mg/g; current 23mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 171mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 189mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.46 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
